name: mahjongplus
description: Networked constitutional riichi mahjong with an extensible rule compiler boundary.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c auto "npm run dev -w @mahjongplus/server" "npm run dev -w @mahjongplus/web"
scripts.build:world: npm run build -w @mahjongplus/world-model && npm run build -w @mahjongplus/world-calculus && npm run build -w @mahjongplus/world-capabilities && npm run build -w @mahjongplus/world-language && npm run build -w @mahjongplus/world-runtime && npm run build -w @mahjongplus/preset-riichi
scripts.build: npm run build:world && npm run build -w @mahjongplus/shared && npm run build -w @mahjongplus/server && npm run build -w @mahjongplus/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @mahjongplus/server && npm run test -w @mahjongplus/world-calculus && npm run test -w @mahjongplus/world-capabilities && npm run test -w @mahjongplus/preset-riichi
